docs.title: Overview
docs.description: Design system index and usage rules.

docs.title: Token reference
docs.description: Every token with Tailwind class names.

artifacts.name: Tables
artifacts.title: Tabular data with columns and rows
artifacts.description: Organize metrics, comparisons, and structured lists in a sortable grid. Status and category labels appear as chips inside cells.

artifacts.name: Charts — bar
artifacts.title: Monthly coffee spend
artifacts.description: Compare categories with bar charts. Switch type and style via the toolbar — ECharts or visx, plain background.

artifacts.name: Charts — area
artifacts.title: Running distance this year
artifacts.description: Filled trends with visx AreaClosed curves by default. Try stream graph when you have multiple series.

artifacts.name: Charts — line
artifacts.title: Sleep hours — last 14 nights
artifacts.description: Time-series line graphs with smooth visx curves. Toggle ECharts straight or smooth styles.

artifacts.name: Charts — pie
artifacts.title: How I spend my weekend
artifacts.description: Share-of-whole breakdowns for personal time, budget slices, or habit splits.

artifacts.name: Charts — gauge
artifacts.title: Emergency fund progress
artifacts.description: Track progress toward a personal goal with a plain gauge or progress bar.

artifacts.name: Code
artifacts.title: Multi-file source snippets
artifacts.description: Explore implementations across one or more files with syntax highlighting. Supports HTML, CSS, Python, TypeScript, and any text format.

artifacts.name: 3D preview
artifacts.title: GLB / GLTF model viewer
artifacts.description: Preview 3D models directly on the canvas. Point to a model URL and rotate or inspect the asset in context.

artifacts.name: Maps
artifacts.title: Geographic place preview
artifacts.description: Pin a geocodable place — city, state, or country — for travel and location context. Saved pins persist when editing.

artifacts.name: Street view
artifacts.title: Ground-level venue preview
artifacts.description: Open Google Street View at a specific named venue — station, hotel, landmark, or address — for a street-level look.

artifacts.name: To-do lists
artifacts.title: Checklists with completion state
artifacts.description: Track actionable items with checkboxes, optional due dates, and priority levels. Use instead of prose lists for tasks.

artifacts.name: Calendars
artifacts.title: Month grid with events
artifacts.description: View a month at a glance with highlighted dates and all-day events. Ideal for scheduling, not chronology over years.

artifacts.name: Timelines
artifacts.title: Chronological event axis
artifacts.description: Map events across time on a horizontal axis. Use for history, roadmaps, and milestones — not month-grid scheduling.

artifacts.name: Custom UI
artifacts.title: Interactive HTML / CSS / JS widget
artifacts.description: Build self-contained interactive components — timers, forms, dashboards, calculators. The artifact is the deliverable.

artifacts.name: Websites
artifacts.title: Link preview for any URL
artifacts.description: Paste a generic URL to spawn a preview card with title, domain, favicon, and optional preview image.

artifacts.name: Images
artifacts.title: Image gallery and references
artifacts.description: Paste image URLs or search Wikimedia for real photographs of places, people, and things.

artifacts.name: Videos
artifacts.title: YouTube and video embeds
artifacts.description: Paste a YouTube or video URL to create a grid of playable clips with thumbnails and titles.

artifacts.name: Audio — short clip
artifacts.title: Voice memo (1 min)
artifacts.description: Drop MP3, WAV, M4A, AAC, OGG, or WebM audio onto the canvas. Waveform width scales with duration.

artifacts.name: Audio — long clip
artifacts.title: Meeting recording (5 min)
artifacts.description: Longer clips spawn wider nodes — a 5-minute file is five times the waveform width of a 1-minute file.

artifacts.name: Repositories
artifacts.title: GitHub repo dashboard
artifacts.description: Paste a GitHub URL to explore a repository with overview, file structure, media, preview, tech stack, and built-by widgets.

artifacts.name: Embeds
artifacts.title: Social and content iframes
artifacts.description: Paste URLs from Reddit, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, Medium, Substack, or Figma for embedded previews.

artifacts.name: Free-form prompts
artifacts.title: Any text the user types
artifacts.description: Open-ended questions and brainstorming spawn text cards and can trigger any artifact type the AI deems fit.

artifacts.name: Time zone converter
artifacts.title: Local ↔ foreign time
artifacts.description: Compare your local clock with any destination timezone. Handy when planning calls or arrivals abroad.

artifacts.name: Currency converter
artifacts.title: Live exchange rates
artifacts.description: Convert amounts between currencies for trips, invoices, or cross-border purchases.

artifacts.name: Unit converter
artifacts.title: Length, weight, temperature
artifacts.description: Convert between metric and imperial units for cooking, science experiments, or travel packing.

artifacts.name: Trip budget planner
artifacts.title: Expense breakdown by category
artifacts.description: Split a trip budget across flights, lodging, food, and activities with running totals.

cards.title: Text answer
cards.description: Default inline Q&A body for prose responses on cards.

card.question: What are good day-trip options from Lisbon?
card.answer: Sintra and Cascais are the easiest wins — both are under an hour by train and pair well with a long weekend in the city.

cards.title: Streaming text
cards.description: Text body with caret while the model is still writing.

cards.description: Code files embedded in the card answer chrome.

cards.title: Pending answer
cards.description: Thinking dots, elapsed time, and token usage while waiting.

cards.title: Retry placeholder
cards.description: Error state with optional try-again action.

cards.title: Artifact preview pill — ready
cards.description: Compact link to a spawned canvas artifact from a card answer.

card.question: Build a budget table
card.answer: I've created a table on the canvas.

cards.title: Artifact preview pill — generating
cards.description: Preview pill while an artifact is still materializing.

connectors.title: Curvy branch connector
connectors.description: Default thread curve from parent to a lateral branch child.

connectors.title: Vertical follow-up
connectors.description: Bottom-to-top curve for a follow-up question in the same thread.
